assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 9-12: '**Checkout the target branch** (feature branch, not main): git checkout TC-9005 / git pull' followed by line 15: 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. The plan explicitly checks out TC-9005 before creating the task branch, and explicitly states 'not main'.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 21: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table" --body "..."'. Also line 24: 'The PR targets `TC-9005` (the feature branch), NOT `main`. This is because the task\'s Target Branch is `TC-9005`.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 15: 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. The task branch is named TC-9205 (the task issue ID), created from TC-9005 (the feature branch). These are clearly distinct.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 41-42: 'Verify that `entity/src/advisory.rs` does NOT reference a `status` column' and 'Read `migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs` to understand the existing migration pattern'. All three files (entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, and migration/src/lib.rs) are referenced in the pre-implementation verification section. Additionally, conventions.md references patterns discovered from 'migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs' and 'migration/src/lib.rs'.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 59: 'With `--trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"`.' This is stated directly after the commit message block.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 49-57: Commit message is 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' which follows type(scope): description format. Footer contains 'Implements TC-9205' referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 9: 'Checkout the target branch (feature branch, not main)' with 'git checkout TC-9005'. Line 24: 'The PR targets `TC-9005` (the feature branch), NOT `main`. This is because the task\'s Target Branch is `TC-9005`.' The plan explicitly identifies TC-9005 as the target branch from the task description and uses it throughout.
